what: Weapon-name list (library/encyclopedia copy of the weapon name strings — the in-battle weapon names live in the code binary's tables). In-place edits over the 0x00-separated name list.
note: the first edit's span also covers the bank's index-like header bytes (they moved with the re-encoded names); its jp/zh text therefore starts with non-prose token noise before the names.
